content:
Today’s 9to5Toys Lunch Break is headlined by the ongoing AirPods Pro 3 price drop, but it’s really all about the MacBooks today. We have the most affordable M5 Pro MacBook Pro back to the all-time low at $250 off, Apple’s least expensive M5 Max MacBook Pro at $300 off and some of the best M5 MacBook Air deals to date at up to $219 off. Those offers join the lowest price ever on 46mm Apple Watch Series 11 Cell models in all four colors at $130 off and new all-time lows on the latest 240W Beats USB-C Braided Cables at $17. Head below for a closer look.

Score Mom (or yourself) some AirPods 4 from $99 this week + AirPods Pro 3 deal

  • AirPods Pro 3 $200 (Reg. $249)
  • AirPods 4 $99 (Reg. $129)

Most affordable M5 Pro MacBook Pro back to all-time low today at $250 off

It’s back! B&H has now brought back the all-time low on Apple’s most affordable new 2026 M5 Pro MacBook Pro at $250 off. This deal is slightly undercutting Amazon to deliver the lowest price we have tracked online from a reputable source since release in March.

This particular 14-inch M5 Pro MacBook Pro with 24GB of RAM and the 1TB storage capacity is currently starting down at the $1,986.50 Amazon all-time low right now.

However, B&H is offering it down at $1,989 with a bonus $40 coupon applied in the cart to drop the price to $1,949 shipped. Regularly $2,199, this is a straight up $250 off the list price and the best we have tracked to date.

We caught this same deal with a different coupon/discount combo at B&H the other day, but it was extremely short-lived. B&H doesn’t accept orders on Saturday, so today might very well be your only shot at landing this all-time low.

This offer on the most affordable M5 Pro MacBook Pro also sits alongside a new all-time low at Amazon on the 14-inch 2TB model as well. The deal isn’t quite as deep at $200 off, but it is the best we have tracked on this configuration and it is currently undercutting B&H, Best Buy, and others.

Scope out more of the best M5 Pro MacBook deals below and keep in mind we also have the base M5 at one of its lowest prices right now as well:

  • 14-inch M5 Pro MacBook Pro 24GB/1TB $1,987 (Reg. $2,199) – Amazon all-time low/$38 less at B&H
  • 14-inch M5 Pro MacBook Pro 24GB/2TB $2,645 (Reg. $2,799)
  • 16-inch M5 Pro MacBook Pro 24GB/2TB $2,549 (Reg. $2,699)
  • 16-inch M5 Pro MacBook Pro 48GB/1TB $2,899 (Reg. $3,099)
  • 14-inch M5 Max MacBook Pro 36GB/2TB $3,359 (Reg. $3,599)
  • 16-inch M5 Max MacBook Pro 36GB/2TB $3,699 (Reg. $3,899)
  • 16-inch M5 Max MacBook Pro 48GB/2TB $4,199 (Reg. $4,399)

Apple’s least expensive M5 Max MacBook Pro just hit its best price at $300 off

Beats recently released a new, longer, and much faster set of premium USB-C cables, and you can now land the new 240W 10-footers at the $17 Prime shipped Amazon all-time low.

Amazon is now offering the new 10-foot Beats 240W USB-C to USB-C Braided Cable down at $16.99 with free shipping for Prime members or in orders over $25.

Best price ever now live on 46mm Apple Watch Series 11 Cell in all four colors at $130 off

Whether you’re looking to score mom a new Apple Watch for Mother’s Day this year or upgrade your wrist to Series 11 status, this week has some of the best deals we have tracked all-time, Black Friday included. There are models starting down at $299 lows, but arguably the best discount here is on the 46mm GPS + Cell model and all four colors are now down to the best price ever at $130 off the list price.

Amazon is now offering the 46mm Apple Watch Series 11 GPS + Cell model down at $399 shipped, and now in all four case options: Jet Black, Rose Gold, Space Gray, and Silver.

This one is regularly $529 and is now $130 off for the lowest price we have tracked to date. While we have seen the Jet Black and Rose Gold at this price for a couple very brief stints previously, this is the first time the Space Gray and Silver have dropped this low at Amazon since release last September.

  • 42mm Apple Watch Series 11 $299 (Reg. $399)
  • 46mm Apple Watch Series 11 $329 (Reg. $429)
  • 42mm Apple Watch Series 11 GPS + Cell $399 (Reg. $499)
  • 46mm Apple Watch Series 11 GPS + Cell $399 (Reg. $529)

You will find some of the high-end Titanium variants at up $160 off right now (check those out below), but for me the aluminum variants at $130 off, undercutting Black Friday, are a more accessible and potentially better value – you’re still going to have to spend upwards of $600 for a Titanium variant.

  • 42mm Apple Watch Series 11 Natural Titanium $609 (Reg. $749) – new all-time low
  • With Natural Milanese Loop
  • 46mm Apple Watch Series 11 Titanium $639 (Reg. $799) – new all-time low
  • Natural, Slate, or Gold
  • With Natural Milanese Loop
  • 46mm Apple Watch Series 11 Titanium $609 (Reg. $749) – new all-time low
  • Natural, Slate, or Gold
  • 42mm Apple Watch Series 11 Slate Titanium $589 (Reg. $699) 
  • With Black Sport Band

Some of the best M5 MacBook Air deals to date are live this week, save up to $219 off Apple’s latest

Most affordable new M5 MacBook Air model back to one of the best prices ever (Nearly $150 off)

Today’s accessories and charging deals:

  • This compact Anker GaNPrime 65W 5-in-1 Charging Power Strip with USB-C is just $27 today
  • Anker’s 2026 Nano Docking Station with secondary removable 6-in-1 hub nearly 30% off today
  • All-new rechargeable UGREEN FineTrack Slim Find My Wallet tracker now up for grabs at just $21 [Launch Deal]
  • This clamp-on USB-C hub makes ports easier to access for $15.50 (Save 40%)
  • Anker’s originally $110 Prime Power Station with smart display now down at $60 shipped
  • Major 50% price drop hits latest Jet Black Powerbeats Fit buds today (Best Buy open-box)
  • The 240W 4-in-1 car charger with retractable USB-C cables I use every day is down to just $50 today
  • Drop this wrap-up 45W USB-C 7-in-1 power strip in your travel bag for $20 (Save 33%)
  • Tidy up all of those cables in one go with this 5-in-1 magnetic organizer: $8 (Save 49%)
  • LISEN’s colorful 5-pack of braided USB-C cables delivers various sizes and styles for $10.50 (Roughly $2 each)
  • Score a pair of Anker wall chargers with two USB-C cables at just $6.50 a pop today (All colors)

Mid-range M5 iPad Pro models now $150 off at Amazon, or up to $300+ off open-box

This morning we are taking a look at pair of mid-range M5 iPad Pro configurations siting down at Amazon lows right now. You’ll now find the 11-inch 1TB and the 13-inch 512GB models at $150 off the list prices to match the lowest we have tracked on Amazon. But we also have some open-box options on these same configurations at up to nearly $300 off.

Amazon is now offering the 11-inch 1TB model at nearly $150 off the list price while the 512GB 13-inch is also down $149 to $1,349.99 shipped. Both of these models are matching the lowest we have tracked on Amazon.

There are discounts across the lineup, but these two are the most notable of the bunch right now:

M5 iPad Pro 11-inch:

  • 11-inch M5 iPad Pro 256GB $899 (Reg. $999)
  • 11-inch M5 iPad Pro 512GB $1,095 (Reg. $1,199)
  • 11-inch M5 iPad Pro 1TB $1,449 (Reg. $1,599)
  • 11-inch M5 iPad Pro 2TB $1,841 (Reg. $1,999)

New all-time low clearance prices hit the M3 iPad Air lineup again, now up to $300 off

We have tracked a resurgence in M3 iPad Air clearance deals this week, with various models now sitting down at the best prices we have tracked to date. While deals on the brand new M4 models roll on, you can land as much as $300 off the original list prices on the M3 iPad Air right now, which is likely more than good enough for most folks. Scope out the offers down below.

As you can see below we are tracking new all-time lows on a trio of 11-inch models and a straight up $300 drop from the original list price on the 1TB 13-inch model:

  • 11-inch M3 iPad Air Wi-Fi + Cell 256GB from $599 (Reg. $849) – new Amazon all-time low
  • 11-inch M3 iPad Air Wi-Fi + Cell 512GB $799 (Reg. $1,049) – new Amazon all-time low
  • 11-inch M3 iPad Air Wi-Fi + Cell 1TB $949 (Reg. $1,249) – new Amazon all-time low
  • 13-inch M3 iPad Air Wi-Fi + Cell 1TB $1,149 (Reg. $1,449) – new Amazon all-time low

Many of these same models were $200 off in and around the release of the new M4 iPad Air model. Since then prices have been creeping down on select storage capacities and colors as Amazon looks to clear out stock of the now previous-generation iPad Air. While we did feature some of these deals previously, the 256GB is $50 less now and there are some additional (or different) color options available on the others.

While there are some improvements on the M4 iPad Air for sure, I would bet that most users wouldn’t even be able to tell which model they have in there hands. Sure, there are loads of techie folks that would, and those that very much do make use of and appreciate the faster and more powerful M4 chip, but for me, and many other, the M3 Air is perhaps the best buy in iPads right now (at prices like these).
